item_text: this activity diagram models the process of accessing a system after user creation.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-usercreation-001 title: user creation success path module: usercreation source pages: 1 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: valid user details (username, password, email). test steps: 1. start the process. 2. check if user has been created. 3. create the user. 4. verify if user creation was correct. 5. navigate to the home page. expected result: user creation is successful, and the user is navigated to the home page.

item_text: the main flow starts at the initial node "start," checks if a user has been created ("utente creato?"), and proceeds to create a user if necessary ("creazione utente").
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-usercreation-001 title: user creation success path module: usercreation source pages: 1 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: valid user details (username, password, email). test steps: 1. start the process. 2. check if user has been created. 3. create the user. 4. verify if user creation was correct. 5. navigate to the home page. expected result: user creation is successful, and the user is navigated to the home page.

item_text: after creating the user, it verifies if the creation was successful ("creazione corretta?") and navigates to the home page if so.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-usercreation-001 title: user creation success path module: usercreation source pages: 1 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: valid user details (username, password, email). test steps: 1. start the process. 2. check if user has been created. 3. create the user. 4. verify if user creation was correct. 5. navigate to the home page. expected result: user creation is successful, and the user is navigated to the home page.

item_text: if the user creation fails, it retries the process.
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-usercreation-002 title: user creation failure path module: usercreation source pages: 1 preconditions: system is up and running. test data: invalid user details (username already exists). test steps: 1. start the process. 2. check if user has been created. 3. attempt to create the user. 4. verify if user creation was correct. 5. retry user creation. expected result: user creation fails due to existing username, and the process retries until successful.

item_text: key edge cases include the scenario where a user is already created, leading directly to the home page without further action.
